search.query: `cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | eval hostAndHostname = hostname."(".device.")" | stats values(device) as device by hostAndHostname | fields hostAndHostname device | sort 0 hostAndHostname

| lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | stats latest(memory_usage_total) AS "Total Memory(KBytes)" latest(memory_usage_used) AS "Used Memory(KBytes)" latest(memory_usage_free) AS "Free Memory(KBytes)" sparkline(avg(memory_usage_used)) AS "Memory Usage Trend" latest(current_memory_status) AS "Current Memory Status" latest(cpu_state_user) AS "CPU User(Percentage)" latest(cpu_state_idle) AS "CPU Idle(Percentage)" sparkline(avg(cpu_state_idle)) AS "CPU Idle Trend" latest(cpu_state_kernel) AS "CPU Kernel(Percentage)" latest(load_avg_1min) as "Load average(1min)" latest(load_avg_5min) as "Load average(5min)" latest(load_avg_15min) as "Load average(15min)" by hostname,device| rename hostname AS Hostname device as Device

| lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | timechart latest(memory_usage_used) AS "Memory Usage Trend" by hostname

drilldown.link: search?q=`cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k component=nxresource device=*| lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | where hostname like "$click.name2$" | stats latest(memory_usage_total) AS "Total Memory(KBytes)" latest(memory_usage_used) AS "Used Memory(KBytes)" latest(memory_usage_free) AS "Free Memory(KBytes)" latest(current_memory_status) AS "Memory Status" by hostname,device| rename hostname AS Hostname device as Device&earliest=$earliest$&latest=$latest$

search.query: | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | timechart latest(cpu_state_idle) AS "CPU Idle Trend" by hostname

drilldown.link: search?q=`cisco_dc_n9k_index` sourcetype=cisco:dc:nexus9k component=nxresource device=*| lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device AS device OUTPUT hostname AS hostname1 | lookup cisco_dc_nexus_hostname_lookup device_without_port as device OUTPUT hostname as hostname2 | eval hostname = coalesce(hostname1, hostname2) | where hostname like "$click.name2$" | stats latest(cpu_state_user) AS "CPU User(Percentage)" latest(cpu_state_idle) AS "CPU Idle(Percentage)" latest(cpu_state_kernel) AS "CPU Kernel(Percentage)" latest(load_avg_1min) as "Load average(1min)" latest(load_avg_5min) as "Load average(5min)" latest(load_avg_15min) as "Load average(15min)" by hostname,device| rename hostname AS Hostname device as Device&earliest=$earliest$&latest=$latest$
